title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Adani Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Adani Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Adani Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adani Enterprises:
Adani Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises!
